event: response.created
data: {"type":"response.created","response":{"id":"resp_inc","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","model":"gpt-4o","output":[],"usage":null},"sequence_number":0}

event: response.in_progress
data: {"type":"response.in_progress","response":{"id":"resp_inc","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","output":[]},"sequence_number":1}

event: response.output_item.added
data: {"type":"response.output_item.added","output_index":0,"item":{"id":"msg_01","type":"message","role":"assistant","status":"in_progress","content":[]},"sequence_number":2}

event: response.content_part.added
data: {"type":"response.content_part.added","item_id":"msg_01","output_index":0,"content_index":0,"part":{"type":"output_text","text":"","annotations":[]},"sequence_number":3}

event: response.output_text.delta
data: {"type":"response.output_text.delta","item_id":"msg_01","output_index":0,"content_index":0,"delta":"Partial output","sequence_number":4}

event: response.incomplete
data: {"type":"response.incomplete","response":{"id":"resp_inc","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"incomplete","incomplete_details":{"reason":"max_output_tokens"},"model":"gpt-4o","output":[{"id":"msg_01","type":"message","role":"assistant","status":"incomplete","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"Partial output","annotations":[]}]}],"usage":{"input_tokens":50,"input_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4096,"output_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":0},"total_tokens":4146}},"sequence_number":5}
